title: uva-ursi uva-ursi var. coactilis
intro: Uva-ursi uva-ursi var. coactilis, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing shrub native to North America, characterized by its small, white flowers and red berries. The plant is rich in arbutin, a compound that has been used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of uva-ursi uva-ursi var. coactilis include its ability to soothe urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Uva-ursi uva-ursi var. coactilis is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
